name: Crab'n Avacado Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Crab meat or imitation crab, cut into bite-size pieces
1/4 cup Ripe olives or pimiento-stuffed green olives, chopped
2 Hard-cooked eggs, sliced or cut into wedges (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. For dressing, in a small bowl combine 1/3 cup Pace Picante Sauce, mayonnaise, tomato paste, relish, and sugar; mix well.
2. In a large bowl combine crab meat, olives, and 3/4 cup of the dressing; mix gently to avoid breaking up crab meat.
3. Cut avacados in half lengthwise. Peel and discard pits.
4. Spoon additional Pace Picante Sauce onto 4 serving plates. Top each with 2 avocado halves and fill indentations with crab meat mixture.
5. Serve with remaining dressing and additional Pace Picante Sauce. Garnish with eggs, if desired.
